_comment: Mana weapons. Each weapon can be equipped by the commander (via GS.commander.weapon) or carried by roster members. Bonuses use the same effect-type system as fort_upgrades.json effects[].
name: Mana Sidearm
desc: A standard-issue mana-discharge sidearm. Feeds off the user's personal mana reservoir. Every licensed contractor carries one.
flavour: The standard. Not impressive. Extremely reliable.

name: Mana-Pulse Rifle
desc: A long-range mana-discharge weapon with a three-round burst mode. Standard infantry kit for any well-funded operation.
flavour: Accurate out to four hundred metres. The burst mode is for when accuracy is secondary to stopping power.

name: Arcane-Chamber Revolver
desc: A precision sidearm with a rotating arcane-crystal chamber. Each crystal is pre-loaded with a specific working — null-field, binding, or penetrating mana-shot.
flavour: Six chambers, six different problems solved. The seventh is handled by the grip.

name: Null-Field Cannon
desc: A shoulder-mounted mana-cannon that projects a sustained null-field burst. Strips wards, disrupts mana-channelling, and does considerable structural damage to anything not rated for null exposure.

name: Resonance Blade
desc: A mana-edged blade that amplifies the user's personal channelling through the cutting geometry. Effective against warded targets. Requires active mana-throughput to maintain the edge.
flavour: It hums when you hold it. That is the mana-current running through the edge. Do not grip the wrong part.

name: Strategic-Class Focus Array
desc: A wrist-mounted mana-channelling array rated for Strategic-Class output. At full draw, the user can project mana-workings at a scale that constitutes a weapons-of-mass-application event under Accord law. Technically illegal without a Sovereign licence.
flavour: The Accord treaty that covers this class of device was signed by seventeen states. You are the reason they are discussing a second treaty.

name: Hero-Class Discharge Array
desc: A purpose-built mana-discharge weapon for a Hero-Class operator. Standard weapon classifications do not apply at this output level. The discharge can penetrate fortification-grade wards and has a documented effective range against armoured formations of over two kilometres.
flavour: At Hero-Class, the weapon is almost beside the point. Almost.
